nodes.name: Discover Target Page
nodes.notes: Fetches the target page URL to extract content structure and internal links

nodes.name: Discover Homepage
nodes.notes: Fetches homepage to extract navigation, social links, and branding

nodes.name: Process Discovery Data
nodes.notes: Extracts internal links, social profiles, and brand data from discovered pages

nodes.name: Set Article Input
nodes.notes: Configure article topic, keyword, and target URL

values.content:
You are a research writer. Write a comprehensive, research-based blog post in Hebrew about the following topic. Use professional academic tone. Include real data, statistics, and references where possible. Structure with clear sections and subheadings.

Topic: {{ $json.topic }}
Keyword: {{ $json.keyword }}
Target institution: המכללה האקדמית נתניה (netanya.ac.il)

Internal links to include:
{{ JSON.stringify($('Process Discovery Data').first().json.internal_links, null, 2) }}

Write 2000-2500 words. Include:
- Definition and overview of the field
- Why study this now (market trends)
- What you learn in the degree
- Comparison with related fields
- Who this suits
- Admission requirements
- Career opportunities with specific roles
- Salary ranges and career progression
- Common mistakes when choosing
- How to choose the right institution
- FAQ section with 6 real questions

Output plain text with section markers. Do not include HTML.

nodes.name: Writing Blog
nodes.notes: Generates the research-based blog content in Hebrew

nodes.name: Preparing Images for HTML
nodes.notes: Prepares image prompts and URLs for the HTML template

nodes.name: Generate HTML Article
nodes.notes: Generates the final HTML article using the prompt template, blog content, and image URLs

nodes.name: Validate & Clean HTML
nodes.notes: Validates the HTML output has all mandatory sections and cleans up formatting

nodes.name: Validation Check
nodes.notes: Routes to WordPress publish if validation passes, or to error handler if not

nodes.name: Publish to WordPress
nodes.notes: Publishes the validated HTML as a draft page in WordPress
